providers.label: Web Research
providers.description: Company overview, product, and market positioning from web sources
providers.prompt_template:
Research the company "{company}". Find their:
- What they do (product/service)
- Target market and customer base
- Key leadership team members
- Approximate company size and location
- Recent news or announcements

Return a JSON object with keys: product_description, target_market, leadership (array of {name, title}), company_size, location, recent_news (array of strings).
Return ONLY valid JSON, no other text.

providers.label: Tech Stack Detection
providers.description: Technology signals from job postings, engineering blogs, and BuiltWith-style data
providers.prompt_template:
Based on this company context:
{context}

Research the technology stack used by "{company}". Look at:
- Job postings for technology requirements
- Engineering blog posts or tech talks
- BuiltWith or similar data
- GitHub/open source activity

Return a JSON object with keys: languages (array), frameworks (array), infrastructure (array), data_tools (array), sales_tools (array), confidence (high/medium/low).
Return ONLY valid JSON, no other text.

providers.label: Funding & Growth Signals
providers.description: Funding rounds, growth metrics, and financial signals from Crunchbase and news
providers.prompt_template:
Based on this company context:
{context}

Research funding and growth signals for "{company}". Find:
- Funding history (rounds, amounts, investors)
- Revenue signals (if public or reported)
- Hiring velocity (job posting volume and trends)
- Growth indicators (new offices, partnerships, product launches)

Return a JSON object with keys: funding_rounds (array of {round, amount, date, investors}), total_raised, hiring_signals (string), growth_indicators (array of strings).
Return ONLY valid JSON, no other text.

providers.label: Competitive Landscape
providers.description: Key competitors and market positioning based on all gathered context
providers.prompt_template:
Based on this company context:
{context}

Identify the competitive landscape for "{company}". Find:
- Direct competitors (same market, similar product)
- Adjacent competitors (overlapping features)
- How this company differentiates
- Market positioning (leader/challenger/niche)

Return a JSON object with keys: direct_competitors (array of {name, overlap}), adjacent_competitors (array of {name, overlap}), differentiation (string), market_position (string).
Return ONLY valid JSON, no other text.
